plan.title: Plan for today
plan.intro: Choose topics you want to cover today, read them in the Study guide, then practice. Your plan resets at midnight (local time).

plan.doneEmpty: Mark topics as studied from the Study guide when you finish reading them.
plan.pickHint: Check the boxes for the subtopics you want in today’s plan.

heatmap.heading: Activity
heatmap.description: Each square is a day. Intensity reflects practice questions answered plus topics marked as studied.
heatmap.gridAria: Daily activity over the past weeks

aboutPage.title: About the project
aboutPage.name1: The name “Karkas” comes from the idea of a foundation — a structure or framework on which everything else is built.
aboutPage.name2: In the context of interviews, it represents the core structure of an answer: once the foundation is clear, the details can be added naturally and confidently.
aboutPage.privacyNotice: Your practice data is stored in your browser only. Nothing is sent to a server — your progress stays private and visible only to you.
aboutPage.purpose1: Karkas is an interview training application designed to help developers turn knowledge into clear, confident answers.
aboutPage.purpose2: Instead of passively learning concepts, you actively practice answering real interview questions under time pressure.
aboutPage.purpose3: The goal is to improve recall, structure thinking, and develop the ability to communicate technical ideas effectively — the skill that often determines success in interviews.
aboutPage.howIntro: The flow is built around short, focused sessions:
aboutPage.step0Desc: On the Plan page, pick subtopics you want to study today. After you read them in the Study guide, mark each topic as studied. Practice then stays limited to those topics until you change the plan.
aboutPage.step1Desc: Read each question with weak, technical, and interview-style model answers so you know what a strong answer sounds like.
aboutPage.step2Desc: In Practice, you get a question and a timer. Answer as you would in a real interview, then compare with the model answers.
aboutPage.step3Desc: Rate how it went: didn’t know, partial, or nailed it. That shapes what you see next and when each question returns for review.
aboutPage.step4Desc: The Progress view highlights weak topics, shows an activity heatmap of recent days, and uses spaced repetition so harder items come back sooner than easy ones.
aboutPage.data1: Stats, ratings, your daily topic plan, and per-day activity for the heatmap are saved only in your browser (local storage). They are not uploaded or synced to the cloud.
aboutPage.data2: If you use another device or browser, that copy of the app will not have your history. Clear site data in the browser to reset progress.
aboutPage.tagline: Train the habit of speaking your technical knowledge out loud.

quiz.loadError: Could not load questions. Check that assets are available and try again.
quiz.fallbackHintDone: No questions were due for review, so all questions were shown.
quiz.fallbackHintActive: Nothing due right now — practicing from the full set.
quiz.planFocusHint: You have topics selected for today but none marked as studied yet. After you mark topics in the Study guide, Practice will use only those questions. Until then, you still practice from the full set (or due reviews).

dashboard.title: Interview Progress
dashboard.weakHint: No weak spots detected yet (need at least 3 attempts on a topic below 60% nailed).
